name: Timberland
summary: Timberland achieved a F (34.9/100) due to their explicit performance across our three pillars. In Planet, they fall behind with 32.7/100 due to a severe lack of verifiable environmental or material transparency commitments. In People, they score a concerning 41.1/100, indicating severe gaps in verified supplier audits or significant government red flags (OSHA/CBP violations). Finally, in Animals, they score 25.0/100 because of an absence of strict public animal welfare commitments or certified raw material tracking.

fti.name: Fashion Transparency Index
fti.context: Scored 66% as part of VF Corporation's brand portfolio.

ktc.name: KnowTheChain Benchmark
ktc.publisher: KnowTheChain / Business & Human Rights Resource Centre
ktc.context: VF Corporation scored 37/100, above the industry average of 21.
